{{Infobox group
| name = Erinin
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Erinin]] compete for status with Heartlanders.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Erinin]] rule over [[Erin]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] mentions an [[Erinin]] orphanage.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
